nasb.text: For Moses from ancient generations has in every city those who preach him, since he is read in the synagogues every Sabbath.”

esv.text: For from ancient generations Moses has had in every city those who proclaim him, for he is read every Sabbath in the synagogues.”

cnv.text: 因為自古以來，在各城裡都有人宣講摩西的書，每逢安息日，在各會堂裡都有人誦讀。”

ccb.text: 因为自古以来，在各城都有人宣讲摩西的律法，每逢安息日，都有人在会堂里诵读。”

csbs.text: 因为自古以来，在各城里都有人宣讲摩西，每逢安息日在各会堂里都有人诵读他的书。”
